rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks within component type or implementation annexes.
Assumptions referring to component ports must be placed in valid component type scopes.
generic_rules: Use valid AGREE syntax for boolean expressions and type alignment in helper declarations.
Avoid encoding AADL property associations as AGREE variables unless explicit typed ports or constants are available.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers; use exact Boolean expressions when the port is an AGREE bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Comparison expressions in AGREE are of type bool; integer and real arithmetic yield int and real types respectively.
AGREE contracts should reference visible symbols from the AADL model's component structure.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes unless subcomponent ports are properly represented.
Do not generate clauses that reference AADL timing properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their unit tokens
Boolean domain value conversion to integers
Subcomponent port usage in component type contracts
